title: After Death
body:
Adds the world of the dead, you will be sent there every time you die making death in the game more than pressing a button to revive.

![Spirit Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1893c2c2453a127efb4de5606e740951dc5c65f.png)

Use of the mod in modpacks authorized.

Added: 

- LighTower

![lt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72beff17218b12a0d3ee05983966aa6177a3d8da.png)

When you find him in the other world, right click to come back to life

- After Death

![af](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/446b2ac2dde048ae3419e2514583aa02bd3269a0.png)

When you die there is a 0.01% chance of spawning a Steve head on the ground. 

- The Death

Neutral
![nd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/549dd779bc119162d7484176091725837ffc4edc.png)

Agressive

the touch of death can cause hit kill

![tdag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a0773cafd27de160756de4b157bd229b2b4b3c.png)

can arrive at any time.

- Spirit Dog
![Spirit Wolf2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f91a5bcbef0d9b802fa3eacac03176c6d168c50.png)

When a tamed wolf dies it will become a semi-immortal spirit wolf.

![Spirit Wolf3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff99e2e6803f5eba97215b83e698df3ec9d72c16.png)

he will accompany players and attack monsters.

- Enchanted Tree

![en](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1de9b45908677d6de9f82c59294fa590332b84f.png)

its leaves drop golden apples and enchanted apples when broken.

 can be found in After Death.

- Krampus

![k](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f33ceae9738c9ec6d2ab980b64e81d19eaaacf7.png)

Krampus spreads snow wherever he goes like snow golems and summons elves through gifts, when defeated he leaves an explosive gift on the ground.

![elfs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/124b373eef642c4cc69f68cfaf10cb7e5692cd6e.png)

- Bloodymary

![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3101f552727041d4f5fe48f6e65774530fb4a8e7.png)

![b2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748942bb73016c7c6a71519ab2363a34113a3429.png)

Bloody Mary can be found in school structures that appear levitating in the dimension after death, her spawn is exclusive and unique to them

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0273e7cdab9f7c5c85cf4dc1ffd7660b5f80bc5f.png)

- Gift
![gift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b3d25f02c1825b3d029e48927a1d3ac6656070b.png)

Earnings:

- 0.1% chance to receive 5 netherite ingots.

- 50% chance of receiving 12 coals.

- 25% chance of krampus appearing.

 
 Gifts have a 0.25% chance of being dropped from defeated mobs
